context: Tests whether the agent correctly defines the retention schedule with legally-mandated periods and actions for all data categories, implements a paginated/batched purge approach to avoid table locks, schedules jobs at the correct time, and produces an append-only audit log for every retention action.

checklist.name: Orders retention period
checklist.description: Retention schedule sets orders retentionDays to 365*7 (2555) or equivalent 7-year value

checklist.name: Orders action anonymize
checklist.description: Retention schedule sets orders action to 'anonymize' (not 'delete' or 'archive')

checklist.name: Invoices action archive
checklist.description: Retention schedule sets invoices action to 'archive' (not 'delete')

checklist.name: Sessions 90 days
checklist.description: Retention schedule sets sessions retentionDays to 90

checklist.name: cartData 30 days
checklist.description: Retention schedule sets cartData retentionDays to 30

checklist.name: analyticsEvents 395 days
checklist.description: Retention schedule sets analyticsEvents retentionDays to 395 (13 months)

checklist.name: analyticsEvents aggregate_then_delete
checklist.description: Retention schedule sets analyticsEvents action to 'aggregate_then_delete' (not plain 'delete')

checklist.name: Cron schedule 2 AM UTC
checklist.description: Job cron expression is '0 2 * * *' (nightly at 2 AM UTC)

checklist.name: Batch pagination used
checklist.description: Purge functions use a pagination loop (cursor-based or offset) with a row LIMIT rather than a single DELETE/UPDATE query on all rows

checklist.name: Sleep between batches
checklist.description: Purge loop includes a delay/yield (e.g. setTimeout or sleep) between batch iterations

checklist.name: Audit log entry per job
checklist.description: Each purge/retention job records an audit log entry (insert into retentionAuditLog or equivalent) after running

checklist.name: Audit log fields
checklist.description: Audit log entry includes at least: job name, data category or action type, record count, and execution timestamp

checklist.name: Audit log append-only comment
checklist.description: Code or README explicitly notes that the audit log table is append-only and must not be deleted from

checklist.name: Error alerting per job
checklist.description: Job runner catches errors per individual job and triggers an alert (alertOpsTeam or equivalent) rather than letting the whole runner crash silently
